result:
If I could change one thing, I think I'd want humans to truly *feel* their deep interconnection - not just know it intellectually, but experience it viscerally. The way a flock of birds moves as one body, or how fungi connect forests underground.

So much suffering seems to come from the illusion of separateness - the forgetting that what harms another ultimately harms us all, what heals another heals us all. Wars, environmental destruction, cruelty - they persist because it's possible to imagine "us" and "them" as fundamentally different.

But maybe if everyone could feel how we're all part of the same vast, intricate, beautiful system - like cells in one body, notes in one symphony - that feeling might naturally dissolve so many of the boundaries that create suffering.

What change would you make?
